title: Discord In Childhood
content:
Outside the house an ash-tree hung its terrible whips,
    And at night when the wind arose, the lash of the tree
    Shrieked and slashed the wind, as a ship's
    Weird rigging in a storm shrieks hideously.

    Within the house two voices arose in anger, a slender lash
    Whistling delirious rage, and the dreadful sound
    Of a thick lash booming and bruising, until it drowned
    The other voice in a silence of blood, 'neath the noise of the ash.
meaning:
D. H. Lawrence (David Herbert Richards)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Discord In Childhood"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
